test_cases.input: Looking for: WHO technical report 'Guidelines for drinking-water quality: Fourth edition incorporating the first and second addenda,' published 2022. WHO link returns 404. Need full PDF for a feature on drinking-water standards in developing countries. No institutional library access. One week available.
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: No tells. Strongest craft: opens with most obvious source (WHO IRIS) rather than following generic template. Tone of a helpful colleague, not a tutorial.

test_cases.input: Looking for: 'Long-term cognitive outcomes following childhood lead exposure: a 30-year longitudinal cohort study' by Nakamura, Silva, and Okonkwo in The Lancet Neurology, 2025. DOI: 10.1016/S1474-4422(25)00123-4. Radio journalist producing documentary on childhood lead poisoning. Need full text today. Public library card but no university affiliation.
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: No lexical or structural tells. Strongest craft: paper's likely funding source reasoned through rather than assumed; email advice ('do not use a subject line that looks like spam') reads as insider knowledge.

test_cases.input: Looking for: Corporate sustainability report by Consolidated Mining Group, published on investor-relations page in 2024, now removed (URL redirects to generic page). Report contained specific emissions figures for three mine sites cited in a published article. Industry PR person claims the report never existed. Need original document to defend published reporting.
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: Strongest craft: 'The removal itself is evidence' — observation a senior investigative editor would make. Output thinks like a journalist, not an information-retrieval system. No tells.
